series_metadata.series_description: Periodic reports of Emergency School Advancement Loans (ESAL); Annual reports of ESAL (Summary); ESAL applications, support documents, loan approval and receipt, repayment schedules, monitoring reports, and necessary notes and communications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until paper is converted to machine readable format, check for accuracy and completeness prior to discarding the paper. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
